about.title: About
about.subtitle: Passionate about technology, driven by knowledge sharing.
about.description: Software engineer based in France, I design and build custom digital solutions. My approach: understand first, code second. I invest in each project as if it were my own, with rigor and pragmatism.
about.description2: Beyond code, I share my passion for tech through my YouTube channel AyLabs — smart home, 3D printing, homelab and more.
about.aycore: Operating through AyCore, a SASU with €1,024 capital. A solid legal framework for a smooth collaboration — clear contracts, professional invoicing, zero risk on your end.
